author: MorganHoratio
post:
@bigbills30 So glad to hear the breakdown helped! Having fellow traders to review and grow with is exactly why I keep sharing these insights. 
 
Regarding the tickers: $KLRA is highly volatile post-IPO, so position sizing is key. While $NBIS is backed by massive Meta/NVIDIA deals, it's currently consolidating—Action: accumulation on pullbacks is safer than chasing. $HIMS remains a solid mid-term play on subscription stability.

author: MorganHoratio
post:
$KLRA: Clinical‑stage biopharma, speculative “unwritten story,” but liquidity is a risk. 
$AVEX: Cancer drug developer with upcoming data readouts — early pattern looks like  HOOD. 
$NBIS: AI infrastructure play, strong narrative but fierce competition — watch for margin bottom. 
$HIMS: Telehealth + consumer brand, stable subs, but valuation is no longer cheap — more mid‑term hold. 
$ONDS: Radar/communication + defense/drone, highly volatile, event‑driven.

author: NasdaqPulse
post:
I called $HOOD early as the next big momentum play — and I’m not slowing down. Still scanning for asymmetric setups with real upside. 
 
👉Click to view @NasdaqPulse  for timely updates amid the volatility. 
 
Here’s what’s on my radar right now: 
 
$KLRA — clinical-stage biotech, low float, high speculation. Story not priced in yet, but liquidity = risk. 
$AVEX — oncology pipeline + upcoming catalysts. Tape starting to resemble early $HOOD-type accumulation. 
$NBIS — AI infra theme still hot. Strong narrative, but margins + competition = key variables. Watching closely. 
HIMS — clean execution, strong subs growth. Not cheap anymore → more of a swing/position trade. 
ONDS — defense + drone tech. Violent moves, pure event-driven name. 
 
I’m hunting for the next 5–10x before the crowd sees it. One name is standing out — will drop it soon. 
 
Stay early or stay chasing.

author: STOCKINSIGHT69
post:
I called $HOOD early as a high-upside play — still tracking, but I’m always hunting for the next asymmetric setup. 
 
Current watchlist (high risk / high reward focus): 
 
$KLRA → Clinical-stage biotech. Pure speculation here — “story still forming.” Low liquidity = position sizing is key. 
$AVEX → Oncology pipeline + upcoming data catalysts. Early structure reminds me of pre-move setups — watching closely. 
$NBIS → AI infra exposure. Strong narrative tailwind, but margins + competition will decide if this re-rates. 
HIMS → Telehealth + consumer brand. Solid subscription model, but not cheap anymore. More swing/position trade vs breakout. 
ONDS → Defense + drone tech. Volatile, headline-driven — can move FAST both ways. 
 
This is not about certainty — it’s about risk/reward and timing. 
 
I’m lining up my next potential 10x candidate — will share soon. 
 
Stay selective. The market rewards positioning, not chasing.
